name: Andy Beshear
subject: Peter, we have concrete plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
It's hard to believe that in less than 100 days Kentuckians will head to the polls to select our next governor. It's been an inspiring campaign so far.
|
---

| | Peter,

It's hard to believe that in **less than 100 days** , Kentuckians will head to the polls to select our next governor. It's been an inspiring campaign so far -- I'm so encouraged by all the support we've received from every corner of Kentucky.

This race is going to be close -- and we're going to have to work harder than ever to make the most of _every single minute_ of the remaining days. **Will you chip in to help us keep fighting at this critical moment?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43caf/3959533145/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43cac/3959533145/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43cad/3959533145/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43ca2/3959533145/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43ca3/3959533145/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43ca0/3959533145/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190730nd__178__")**
Jacqueline and I will be crisscrossing the Commonwealth in the coming weeks, talking to as many Kentuckians as we can about the issues that matter most: affordable health care, better schools, and good-paying jobs. While Matt Bevin is making things worse, we have concrete plans to make a real, positive difference in people's lives.

Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the country for a reason. He's wrong for Kentucky families. But he has deep-pocketed friends who are determined to see him get reelected. **So we need to make sure every Kentuckian who wants change gets out to the polls on November 5.[Will you pitch in whatever you can -- no donation is too small -- to make sure we can get the job done?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43ca1/3959533145/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=5")**

I'm proud of what we've gotten done together during my time as attorney general, and as governor I'll continue to fight for Kentucky families with the same passion and dedication. Let's go win this!

\-- Andy

| **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b16/ad6dc73/14b5e4ae/db43ca1/3959533145/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190730nd__178__&amount=5")**

name: records@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Is this correct, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190730PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, we're less than 28 hours before our end-of-month deadline hits, and we're still falling short of our goal.

**And _Axios_ just reported "Democrats sound alarm on 'massive' GOP Senate advantage in 2020" and "Republicans have a significant head start in the race to keep control of the Senate."**

If we don't close this gap, we could lose this critical U.S. Senate seat. And with it, our chances of taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP.

We just checked our records, and according to the latest data you have yet to contribute to our July budget goal. **[Can you rush $5 now to help Tina close the gap, and keep this Senate seat in Democratic hands?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190730PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** | **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**JULY DONATION STATUS:** PENDING
**ACTION NEEDED:[DONATE $5 OR MORE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190730PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
---
Republicans came within 1.5 points of taking Minnesota in the last Presidential year, and now they're promising their BIGGEST campaign in the state in history. We must be ready.

If you want to ensure Democrats can stop right-wing judges, protect health care, and take action on climate change, you must give it all you can now. **[Rush $5 or as much as you can to keep this Senate seat in Democratic hands.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190730PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything,

Team Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190730PM_em-biobox&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

subject: This is a fundraising email

body:

name: Tim Ryan
subject: thanks for having me, Detroit!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
What a rush folks!

I just walked off the debate stage, and I can tell you one thing: I've never felt more confident that we are on the right track.

We've been talking about the issues that came up tonight for decades -- creating a health care system that works for everyone, putting people back to work, reinvesting in students and educators, protecting our environment -- but we haven't solved these problems.

**It 's time for us to work together and act boldly, with conviction and determination guiding us. Together, I know that we can bring new solutions to the table and build a nation that works for everyone.**

[**If you like what you heard tonight, will you join my grassroots movement to create real change in America (and send Trump back to Mar-a-Lago for good!)?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+like+what+you+heard+tonight+will+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")****

**_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process NOW by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ ** ****[Rush $3 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")

[Rush $10 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")

[Rush $25 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")

[Rush $50 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")

[Or rush another amount.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Or+rush+another+amount&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")****
I know the media and pundits are talking about who won and lost this debate, but that's not my main concern.

The better question is who captured your imagination about what America could be? And I think I have the answer to that one. **We win the future by coming together to find new and better solutions to our biggest challenges.**

[**Our campaign is moving ahead at full speed -- but coming off the stage with the rest of our well-financed challengers means we need each and every one of you to help us sustain our momentum.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+Our+campaign+is+moving+ahead+at+full+spe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")

I know that we have what it takes to create a new and better America -- but we can't do it solo. Building for the better means all hands on deck.

**What do you say? Are you with us?**

**[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/momentum](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacommomentum&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_4_4")**

Tim

name: Topher Williams, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Did you see John tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
We need a candidate with a pragmatic, progressive plan for this country to take on Donald Trump in 2020--that's why we need John on every debate stage. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771737/691c9bd/6ef125b8/11a45631/1498217855/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

**We need a candidate with a pragmatic, progressive plan for this country to take on Donald Trump in 2020 --that's why we need John on _every_ debate stage.**

Tonight, John showed that he's a candidate who can create real, measurable progress on the important issues facing our country. He did it in Colorado, and he'll do it as president.

John stood tall on stage, and he's climbing in the polls, but this race is about to get a lot more competitive. As you may have heard, the DNC is requiring each candidate to have 130,000 individual donors to qualify for the next debate.

[**_Can you chip in now to get John to the next debates?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_TW_20190730-fr-TW-postdebate-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_TW_20190730-fr-TW-postdebate-all_all_contribbutton1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
Topher

Topher Williams
Digital Director
Hickenlooper 2020

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771737/691c9bd/6ef125b8/11a4562d/1498217855/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771737/691c9bd/6ef125b8/11a4562a/1498217855/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771737/691c9bd/6ef125b8/11a4562b/1498217855/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771737/691c9bd/6ef125b8/11a45628/1498217855/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we're going to save our democracy, build an economy that works for everyone, and clean up corruption in Washington, we're going to need big ideas -- and a big grassroots movement to fight for them. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ebfa/45c30650/15cf585b5/66801cb6/1854210759/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Thank you for everything you do as a member of this grassroots team.

**Tonight and every day, I'm not afraid to fight alongside you for the big, structural change we need -- because the time for small ideas is over.**

If we're going to save our democracy, build an economy that works for everyone, and clean up corruption in Washington, we're going to need big ideas -- and a big grassroots movement to fight for them.

**[Are you able to help make it happen? It's powerfully important that we hit our July fundraising goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline. So I'm asking you: Can you make your first contribution right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ebfa/45c30650/15cf585b5/66801cb9/1854210759/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDczMGVtNS12MS1mdWxsLWEifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190730em5-v1-full-a")**

name: Team Beto
subject: What we saw in tonight’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Tonight, America saw why Beto O’Rourke should be president.
#
Tonight, America saw why Beto O’Rourke should be president.
They saw how he was able to inspire so many in Texas; how he’s inspiring so many Americans at town halls from Sioux City, Iowa to Flint, Michigan; and how he’d lead our country with strength and compassion. The polar opposite of Donald Trump, he invoked optimism over fear, inclusion over division, and focused on the future rather than the past.
[If you’re fired up, can you chip in $3 now to help us defeat Donald Trump in 2020 and unite our country in 2021?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21156?refcode=ema20190730-45988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=45988%2E444211%2E-vsoLX)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21156?refcode=ema20190730-45988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=45988%2E444211%2E-vsoLX)**
Beto always says what he believes. In a night full of contentious disagreement, Beto rose above. He was the only candidate on stage to give clear, decisive and strong answers — not giving an inch — while many others on stage equivocated or split hairs or even reversed their previous positions.
He’s the right candidate to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. And as he pointed out (and as a poll showed today), he’s the candidate best positioned to bring together not only Democrats, but Independents and Republicans to win the new battleground state of Texas, and its 38 electoral votes.
[Will you help us build this campaign by making a $3 contribution?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21156?refcode=ema20190730-45988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=45988%2E444211%2E-vsoLX)
On all of the issues the American people care about most — from confronting climate change to Trump’s tariffs that amount to taxes on workers and farmers — he led on substance, not only showing he has the policy chops to stand toe-to-toe with anyone in our party, but that his vision for our country is most in line with the people’s:
* **Health care:** Beto gave the clearest answer of the night — a firm “no” on raising middle class taxes. Almost all Americans support Medicare for America over Medicare for All. They don’t want to have to make a false choice between a broken status quo and a plan that eliminates private insurance.

* **Immigration:** While others backed off of their previous answers, Beto gave a clear answer on where he stands — with Americans who believe we can be a nation of immigrants and a nation of laws. Beto’s plan to rewrite our immigration laws in our own image is the boldest and most ambitious of anyone in this race—but he’s also on the American people’s side when it comes to ensuring we have the tools we need to deal with traffickers and smugglers.

* **Racial justice:** Beto called out Trump’s racism. He was the first candidate to bring up teachers, farmers, veterans, the conditions in Flint, and to decry Trump’s Muslim ban. And he gave a powerful answer on systemic racism in America, with a full-throated endorsement of Sheila Jackson Lee’s reparations bill.

**Beto isn’t focused on pithy one-liners or divisive takedowns.** He spends his time listening to the American people where they are. Tonight, Beto’s approach and the type of leader he will be was on full display. This is only the beginning.
[Let’s build this campaign together. Make a $3 contribution now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21156?refcode=ema20190730-45988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=45988%2E444211%2E-vsoLX)
Thank you for stepping up, especially on a night like tonight.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=45988%2E444211%2E-vsoLX). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Peter Khalil
subject: What a debate....
body:
| | | | Tonight we watched a heated Democratic debate on issues that impact all of us: Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, corruption in our government...
---
---
**—**
Tonight we watched a heated Democratic debate on issues that impact all of us: Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, corruption in our government... Issues that demand immediate action and deserve our full attention.
I was saddened, though, when the importance of these issues became overshadowed by a debate on whether these policies were "political suicide", "socialism", or too "extreme" for the average voter.
These are not partisan issues. Rather than debate political strategy, we need to speak the truth and take immediate action to improve peoples' lives.
This means no one in this county having to choose between food or insulin.
This means making sure our grandchildren breathe clean air and drink clean water.
This means investing in technology today for an economy inevitably to come.
The time is now to catch up with the rest of the modern world, to not be distracted by labels and fear-tactics, and to stand for a government that puts the needs of the people first.
Stand with us and fight for this future.
Your neighbor, Peter

---
We need your help! Fuel the Progressive movement in SW Washington and help us get an office by becoming a sustaining donor!

Peter,

**Today is the last day to reach our July fundraising goal.**

Abigail has been working around the clock, and Whitney and I have been looking at our spreadsheets each day to check where we are on our goal.

[_**As of right now, we 're now $4,767 away from reaching our July goal.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/DvLk49nfUFPyqr__WgcLi1s5FOQXupqVZl7fDwLc1Uc=/c3U89TGBGaxQSLbWlJgwQdtGgmTf5qVn8rc9xU5p-2k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190731-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

I want us to head into August sending a clear signal that we're going to have the resources to protect this seat in 2020.

Our election is going to be a nail-biter. Cook Political Report calls our seat a toss-up.**A toss-up.**

That means that Abigail is going to be a top-target for far-right Super PACs. And it means that if we don't build a grassroots operation to be able to respond, we could be in jeopardy.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Fwd: URGENT 🚨- A Message From a Wounded Patriot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
I wanted to make sure you saw the message from my good friend and colleague Brian Mast. As the mainstream fake news media and the radical left in this country continue to attack me, it's great to know that Brian has my back.
Can I count on your support too?
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wx1luoeLegZ8PC1zx1cdH0HRa2YmwC5ehWQ8OGyOBfVydbxYieVCzyPkKEBMs61-NAkcxSk1EUK3Bnw6f-acopsUZJw2Fg-j--3tAjimhBA8F0OujOl3mNX21cNe19gcQjNElmUnqGX1uKCJypArDbXIwfTOGD6HkGz8a-ovBeNIAYZKyhGLUrABcuGy9jGQ&c=oJ6kM8fd5kIE83FwNmDDvatyfhjfmWgs4IAyvHo4ESBMitMZhc43Tg==&ch=TEX3WOP4vtfVGbTFSbxX8bziQQ-KH0KTilLWz_Hqu_dr48bE_8CBTg==)
---
| Brian and I don't want America to become a socialist country and with your help today and moving forward, we will make sure that never happens!
Thank you for your support,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

\---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Brian Mast <[info@mattgaetzforflorida.com](mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com)> Date: Mon, Jul 29, 2019 at 6:30 PM Subject: URGENT 🚨- A Message From a Wounded Patriot To: Matt Gaetz

---
| Patriot,
I served with some of the most patriotic men and women on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now, in Congress, I serve with another patriot - someone who is fighting back against corruption in DC and fighting for the American values of personal freedom and individual liberty. That person is Matt Gaetz.
Matt's determination to do what he believes is right - which isn't always popular - is just one of the many reasons that he is constantly under attack for his support of President Trump.
Matt is fighting against the D.C. swamp, and because of this, Nancy Pelosi and her liberal/socialist allies have put a target on our backs. Pelosi and national Democrats WILL NOT STOP the attacks until we are both silenced and out of office.
These are the same national Democrats that defend anti-Israel statements made by Congresswoman Ilhan Omar and support the socialist policies of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: very proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Did you know that our average online donation in July is just $19.66?
I'm proud of that number because it shows that grassroots donors -- hardworking people like you -- are the lifeblood of this campaign.
**Many candidates rely on corporate special interests for support, but I 'm counting on folks like you to protect this vulnerable seat from the likes of the NRA and the Koch Brothers.**
New Hampshire elections are historically competitive and Republican Senator Kelly Ayotte nearly beat me in 2016, so it's important that we finish the month out strong. That's why I'm asking: [**Please donate $19.66 -- our average donation - or whatever you can before tonight's July fundraising deadline. Any amount helps, and I'd be very grateful for the support.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc241/2a380d31/3cd62797/f0cb9d/2525326892/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDczMV9FT00zX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190731_EOM3_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I intend to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Did you watch last night’s presidential debate? There were so many great candidates on stage sharing their big, bold ideas for how to lead our country -- it made me fired up to be a Democrat. No matter the outcome of this primary, I am committed to defeating Donald Trump in November of 2020. I’ve never backed down from a fight -- and I intend to win this race. **I’m ready to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump. name: Ed Markey
subject: major disadvantage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - In a moment I'm going to ask you to _**[donate to my campaign before our midnight deadline](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ , but first, I want you to know why this is so important.

When I ran for the Senate in 2013, it cost me more than $18 million to win. In 2020, during a presidential election year, it's going to cost even more.

And you can probably imagine why it's going to cost so much. Donald Trump and the RNC are going to pound your tv, radio, and everywhere you go online with attack ads.

And if we miss a single fundraising goal, we'll be at a major disadvantage when those attacks hit.

_**[That's why I have to ask for your help to raise the last $8,402 of our $25,000 goal. Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us keep our momentum moving toward victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

#
A little over six years ago, David launched his campaign for U.S. Senate as an outsider who had never run for anything before. We saw that America was in a moment of crisis and that Washington needed a new perspective.

Like you, I’m so proud of David and what we’ve accomplished since then, but there’s so much more left to do. We are counting on your continued support to make a difference.

**Our next fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 pm.** [**Would you consider chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to help us hit our goal?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=dfda888474&e=02cd889ad3)

| **As we’ve all seen, Democrats are targeting Georgia. **They’re raising and spending millions here already. _**Some polls have even shown Democrats LEADING in Georgia.**_

David is doing everything he can to fight back, but the truth is that we simply can’t do this without you! We need each of our supporters to step up now so that we can win in 2020.

[**Please consider giving whatever you can afford by 11:59 PM TONIGHT. It could make the difference!**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=94b76dbe58&e=02cd889ad3)

Bonnie Perdue

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: This fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
I was raised to believe that you do not simply identify problems, you have to figure out how you intend to solve them. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d13a/1460985717/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - This fight for free and fair elections isn't just a mantra, it is a mission. And it is personal for me. I was raised in Mississippi, where my parents joined the civil rights movement as teenagers, and they instilled in their six children a deep respect for the right to vote. I came of age in Georgia, where I registered voters while in college, served as Georgia House Democratic Leader, and where I stood for office as the democratic nominee for governor in 2018. I was raised to believe that you do not simply identify problems, you have to figure out how you intend to solve them. When I ended my campaign and announced the launch of Fair Fight, I made a choice. I chose not to challenge the outcome of my election, but to challenge a system of voter suppression that undermines our democracy by subverting the will of the people. For me, the response to sorrow, the response to anger is action. But to take action in the way that is necessary to defend our democracy, we need to scale our operation. So I'm asking you: **[Make your first donation to Fair Fight today before our critical end-of-month deadline so that we can protect the right to vote and drive a national conversation about voter suppression.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d13b/1460985717/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE073119SYAND")** Our shared responsibility is to talk about why voting matters and to make sure that every voter and every candidate gets a fair fight. Because you cannot have true freedom without the right to vote. Yours in the fight,
Stacey Abrams **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d13b/1460985717/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE073119SYAND")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d138/1460985717/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d139/1460985717/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa522/34a064cc/19f04894/703d146/1460985717/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Tina Smith
subject: Completely honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| Here's the truth, team.

As I write this, we're $6,033 away from our July fundraising goal. Hitting this number means we can fulfill all our budget responsibilities, hire the staff we need, and be ready for the attacks right-wing special interests are sure to throw at us.

That's why I'm asking if you can give it all you can, so we can close the gap and ensure this Senate seat stays in Democratic hands. I'm counting on you, please pitch in here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190731AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

I know this campaign can't succeed without the support of every member of this team, and I'm so proud to be fighting alongside you.

Thank you for everything,

Tina

subject: unfortunately
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Paul Begala asked. Gabby Giffords asked. After my closest Democratic colleagues told you how important tonight's deadline is to winning my Senate race, I hoped I would see a surge of support. **But unfortunately, it 's starting to look like I might not meet my end-of-month goal. ** I have 14 hours left before my deadline. But you've never let me down before. Not once. I'm counting on you to pull through for me one more time. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fe/18e32a7f/5467a8b0/7bcb1b42/2930982904/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $15 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fe/18e32a7f/5467a8b0/7bcb1b42/2930982904/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---

I need to be completely honest with you:**If we lose this race, we will have zero chance of winning the Senate.** That's why President Trump and Mitch McConnell are outright targeting my state.

I can't overstate how important your $15 is before tonight's deadline. Can I count on you?

| [**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fe/18e32a7f/5467a8b0/7bcb1b43/2930982904/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

I won't sugarcoat it, Derek.

When my new opponent jumped into the Virginia Senate race earlier this month, this campaign got a heck of a lot tougher. At the same time, President Trump is convinced he can win Virginia next year, and we need to ramp up our efforts now so we don't fall behind.

With a GOP opponent now in the race and the Trump campaign headquarters now open in Virginia, we can't wait until next year to start taking this race seriously. I'm not taking anything for granted, and frankly, I hope you won't either.

There are fewer than **48 hours left** to reach our 1,000 new donor end-of-month goal, and it's crucial that we do if we're going to defend Virginians' healthcare and stand up for our democracy.

**Will you make a donation before tomorrow 's deadline and become one of the 49 donors we need from Manassas to help us reach our end-of-month goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tim Walz
subject: Passing this along
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
My friend,

See below. I just got this update from Berrett. It looks like we’re still trailing our budget target for July by about $1,300.

It adds up fast when we miss our goals, and we need to be running at full capacity to keep Minnesota blue and elect allies who will help us move our One Minnesota agenda forward next year.

Our deadline is at midnight. Will you make a contribution of $5 or more before we run out of time? We’re tracking donations through this link: https://walzflanagan.org/july-eom-tw

Thank you,

Tim Walz

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: Berrett Gall
Date: Wed, July 31, 2019
Subject: July Budget Target

Tim,

Here’s where we stand for July:

RAISED: $8,717
GOAL: $10,000
OUTSTANDING: $1,283

We’re still short, but getting closer. You can send folks this link to track contributions: https://walzflanagan.org/july-eom-tw

I’ll circle back closer to midnight with another update.

Best,

Berrett

--
Berrett Gall
Finance Director
Tim Walz for Governor

| Friend, Last week, when I asked you to stand with me against Cong. Ilhan Omar's support for taxpayer-funded abortions for illegal immigrants, hundreds of concerned citizens joined our cause and signed up! I am working tirelessly in Congress to stop abortions and illegal immigration -- here are a few specific examples of our recent work on these two issues:
* I voted to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding entirely and voted in support of the 20-week abortion ban. Unfortunately, Democrats have blocked these two critical ideas but I am still working to pass these provisions.
* Just last week, I wrote and sponsored legislation that would effectively cripple sanctuary cities, by allowing citizens who are victims of crimes committed by illegal immigrants to sue the sanctuary city. Sanctuary cities make a mockery of the rule of law and have no place in our country.

**_Our fight is at a perilous point right now._** Radical liberals are on a warpath, doubling down on their commitments to abortion and sanctuary cities. In fact, if they could, they would _nationalize_ sanctuary city policies and fund abortion clinics in every community. **Their agenda is wrong for our country.** These radical liberals are also on a warpath to defeat me in 2020 - because they know where I stand on these issues. That's why they have committed literally millions of dollars to defeating me in 2020. [That's why I'm asking you for more help -- will you pitch in to the campaign today so that we may have the tools to fight back most effectively?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMjEyMjk4MTMyOTM1Njc3NTg1JmM9ZjFtNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNjcwOTg1NDQmZD1rNGEzYjVz.KOv7uymV7qpsNJkKL89_jLUExCzVYXOndALMI-6U9p0) [_Our campaign is funded by the grassroots, and we're up against Hollywood and Manhattan money. | | I'll tell you the same thing I told Stephen Colbert: **I left it all out on that first debate stage --_and I don 't regret a second. _** [_**I 'm now so incredibly close to securing my spot in the next debates. I just need one final surge of support. Your contribution before my End of Month Deadline at midnight would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becb6/2772511171/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becb6/2772511171/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")
---
I'll be blunt:

I didn't have the luxury of growing up a frontrunner.

I don't have wealthy donors at my disposal to fill my budget gaps.

I don't have unlimited resources to blanket the airwaves with my message.

**But what I do have are my bold ideas, a unique vision for this country, and a determination to share that vision with you. **

You deserve someone fighting for you on that debate stage -- someone who's walked a mile in your shoes.

So I'm humbly asking for $13 before my midnight deadline to qualify for the next debates and share my story on that stage:

| [**Chip in $6 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becb6/2772511171/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becbf/2772511171/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becbe/2772511171/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec6/3eb3e2fc/5b1830fc/744becbd/2772511171/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Fwd: not there yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Hello

See below. We are almost out of time - if you haven’t had the chance, I need you to donate before midnight tonight. My team and I have set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of July, and we are still $2,325 short of our goal.

We’re so close, but time is running out. Will your donation be the one that puts us over the top? Please, [click here](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2e62097847464403951fbc2d519ad8c4&_e=0Vb5zpaoQzDe_3sRe_2MjtmWkqwHq4xsh9-kIIyCL3YaTLyvqcjc8hvvu-_iz2s1jjSpyrvZlOgTOrMa38UwO064ZLiGRbj3zpfog9ORNCsNCczANLBsXwFozEKU3n_DztcVro81K2sQuPnobOfqxuvgEMiKmhsuJ_zveHXIZ_SaBR3qOOkpPYCDzaeGI2aN3rqQOecctHZ0GrPiJ8KL3bS0rqiKHmg1ITT97srROFleT4h_k32Qo0FqFxzjt0XJVgP1d_exn1Ccg6qxxLh0eiIPr3knWgNnFe00lAsWu9R2vB94cpPm10IojXpTxOWcuCTiiNDcSlztwKQrjGw01hvMScW8LdGy0djoqmdlvGuhGrI5-FX14B65Gl5EMhUm0JQpsBDBGk1ejx1O6tEKqw%3D%3D) and make your voice heard. Donate today.

Thank you for everything,
Josh

\-------Forwarded Message-------

From: Kathryn
To: Josh (personal)
Date: July 31, 2019
Subject: not there yet

Josh, I wanted to send you an update. We are still short of the $25,000 goal for the end of month deadline. We need to raise another $2,325 before midnight. Is there anyone you can reach out to before then?

Let me know if you have any other questions.

Kathryn.

Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Andrea Ryan
subject: RE: thanks for having me, Detroit!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
I wanted to make sure you saw Tim's message from after the debate. I'm so proud of him and his performance on the debate stage. That's why I'm reaching out now, if we want to keep Tim on the road talking to voters, and building momentum -- then he needs your help now.

**Click here to donate and help keep up the momentum![https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/momentum](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacommomentum&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")**

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

> What a rush folks!
>
> I just walked off the debate stage, and I can tell you one thing: I've never felt more confident that we are on the right track.
>
> We've been talking about the issues that came up tonight for decades -- creating a health care system that works for everyone, putting people back to work, reinvesting in students and educators, protecting our environment -- but we haven't solved these problems.
>
> **It 's time for us to work together and act boldly, with conviction and determination guiding us. Together, I know that we can bring new solutions to the table and build a nation that works for everyone.**
>
> [**If you like what you heard tonight, will you join my grassroots movement to create real change in America (and send Trump back to Mar-a-Lago for good!)?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+If+you+like+what+you+heard+tonight+will+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")****
>
> **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process NOW by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ ** ****[Rush $3 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")
>
> [Rush $10 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")
>
> [Rush $25 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")
>
> [Rush $50 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")
>
> [Or rush another amount.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+Or+rush+another+amount&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")****
> I know the media and pundits are talking about who won and lost this debate, but that's not my main concern.
>
> **We win the future by coming together to find new and better solutions to our biggest challenges.**
>
> [**Our campaign is moving ahead at full speed -- but coming off the stage with the rest of our well-financed challengers means we need each and every one of you to help us sustain our momentum.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+Our+campaign+is+moving+ahead+at+full+spe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")
>
> I know that we have what it takes to create a new and better America -- but we can't do it solo. Building for the better means all hands on deck.
>
> **What do you say? Are you with us?**
>
> **[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/momentum](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacommomentum&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_1_1_T2")**
>
> Tim

name: Michael (personal)
subject: not throwing away my shot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend,

I'm in Detroit, preparing for tonight's debate (and listening to a little Lin-Manuel Miranda).

I want to make a few things clear before I take the stage:

[**If we 're going to reverse the damage done by Donald Trump and break up the tyranny of Mitch McConnell and the Freedom Caucus, we need to act swiftly with ambitious and durable solutions to our nation's greatest challenges.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd4/134673f2/eed3249/69966fcc/2720324891/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

When I'm on stage tonight, that's what I'll be fighting for.

Tonight, I'm making an urgent case that to find our path forward, Americans must reclaim the ideals of our founders and repair the damage that's been done.

These include our most cherished beliefs: that we are created equal; that our rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness are inalienable; and that it is our collective obligation to seek a more perfect union.

[**But I can 't do it without you.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd4/134673f2/eed3249/69966fcc/2720324891/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Your support makes a difference in our campaign, day in and day out. Every contribution helps get out our message and expand our grassroots efforts.

[**So I have to ask: will you make your first donation to my presidential campaign before I take the stage tonight?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd4/134673f2/eed3249/69966fcc/2720324891/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd4/134673f2/eed3249/69966fc3/2720324891/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

I hope I make you proud tonight, friend.

Thanks,

Michael

| | Paid for by Bennet for America
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm in Detroit, preparing for tonight's debate (and listening to a little Lin-Manuel Miranda). I want to make a few things clear before I take the stage: "" When I'm on stage tonight, that's what I'll be fighting for. Tonight, I'm making an urgent case that to find our path forward, Americans must reclaim the ideals of our founders and repair the damage that's been done. These include our most cherished beliefs: that we are created equal; that our rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness are inalienable; and that it is our collective obligation to seek a more perfect union. "" Your support makes a difference in our campaign, day in and day out. Every contribution helps get out our message and expand our grassroots efforts. "" | | "" I hope I make you proud tonight, friend. Thanks, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The 99% Get a Bigger Raise
body:
"Political discourse nowadays is enough to depress anyone, and the media don’t help by ignoring good economic news." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f7e18a096&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The 99% Get a Bigger Raise**

“Political discourse nowadays is enough to depress anyone, and the media don’t help by ignoring good economic news. But buck up, Americans: Worker wages are growing much faster than previously reported,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

American workers’ paychecks rose 4.5 percent in 2017 and 5 percent in 2018—$4.4 billion and $87.1 billion _more_ than first reported, respectively. “The trend has continued into 2019, with compensation increasing $378 billion or 3.4% in the first six months alone.”

Of course, “recall how liberals blamed ‘secular stagnation’ as the reason worker incomes weren’t growing faster during the latter years of Barack Obama’s Presidency. Yet employee compensation has increased by $150 billion more in the first six months of 2019 than all of 2016.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9998cdae48&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| A majority of Americans say that illegal immigration impacts their lives, Paul Bedard reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=026132480b&e=3ee4985eea) _._ “The top concern about illegals was abuse of social programs like healthcare, public schools and welfare.” Three times as many Americans named illegal immigration as their top concern compared with healthcare.
---
|
---
| “According to early headlines in the media, the Department of Veterans Affairs' implementation of the MISSION Act was going to be something of a mess,” Veterans Affairs Secretary Robert Wilkie writes for [Military.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8d0a7b420&e=3ee4985eea). “But thanks to thousands of dedicated VA workers around the country and President Donald J. Trump's support for this historic reform, elements of the MISSION Act took effect on June 6, and veterans immediately began benefitting from the largest transformation in veterans' health care since the end of World War II.”
---
|
---
| “59 percent of voters see Big Tech bias as a problem, including 68 percent of Republicans and 53 percent of Democrats,” Harmeet Dhillon writes in _[Townhall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd3b4c74a8&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Now that President Trump has championed the cause of internet freedom for all Americans, Big Tech has begun to fight a war of attrition — and our ability to speak and vote freely hangs in the balance.”
---
|
---
| “Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khameini last week touted Iran’s support for the Palestinian terrorist group Hamas,” White House Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt and U.S. Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook write in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9d0456bab&e=3ee4985eea). Iran’s leader says he wants to counter the Trump Administration’s Middle East peace plan by arming Palestinians with precision rockets. “The world should be rooting for the Trump administration’s peace vision and the future generations of Israelis and Palestinians who have suffered from this decades-old conflict. The world should be united against Iran’s illicit business and terror activities.”
---
|
---
| President Trump has a simple yet holistic vision on health care that separates him from the left, according to HHS Secretary Alex Azar: “He intends to protect what works and fix what’s broken”—including protecting private insurance and Medicare, which currently cover 240 million Americans. Dr. Marc Siegel of NYU, writing in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f14db8a7f&e=3ee4985eea), calls the President’s strategy “refreshing to doctors, hospitals, and patients.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec916946de&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e78ed1734&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5c5a4ac75c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Edana Walker, National Finance Director
subject: Another test at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

We are facing another big fundraising challenge: we need to raise $1395 by midnight tonight to hit our July goal. With your help, we’ve already shown that Teresa is a serious contender to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator. But our work has only just begun.

Can you chip in $5 right now and help our campaign spread a progressive message across Georgia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&noskip=true]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&amount=5&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&amount=100&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&amount=250&express_lane=true]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a]

Your donation is the fuel that drives this campaign. Without you, our organizers can’t knock on doors, our yard signs remain in boxes in our office, our ads never go online, our message for a progressive Georgia never gets out.

And we all know that we need a progressive voice in Georgia. Someone who will fight for policies that help all of us, not just the corporations or the rich. We need affordable health care, we need criminal justice reform, we need equality for all and voting rights that are universal and protected. We need someone who is a proven fighter: We need Teresa.

But most of all, right now, we need your help. Together, we are going to build a campaign that can spread this progressive message and turn these policies into reality. With your $5 donation our organizers can keep up their hard work on the ground and our campaign can continue to fight for the progressive ideals that we need. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&noskip=true]

We only have a few hours before this critical end of month deadline. Everyone is watching. With your help, we will be able to build the type of campaign we need to achieve victory in 2020.

Thank you,
Edana Walker
National Finance Director

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em073119-a&noskip=true]

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the big, structural change we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I will beat Donald Trump in 2020, but I won't do it alone. Side by side, we'll build a movement, we'll fight, and we'll win. And then we'll make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond. If you're... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852eb27/45c30650/15c5228e8/66802263/1851918631/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I genuinely do not understand why anyone would go to all the trouble of running for president just to talk about what's not possible and what we shouldn't fight for.

**Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the big, structural change we need -- to make our government and our economy work for working people. I'm not afraid to fight for this. And for Democrats to win, you can't be afraid either.**

I took on the big banks, and I beat them. I took on Wall Street CEOs, and I beat them. I took on a popular incumbent senator, and I beat him.

**I will beat Donald Trump in 2020, but I won 't do it alone. Side by side, we'll build a movement, we'll fight, and we'll win.**

_And then we 'll make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond._

**[If you're ready to be in this fight all the way, chip in right now to help grow our movement. name: Mary Ellen Smith
subject: We can't stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
John stood tall on stage last night because of your support--but we can't stop now. The strength of this campaign will not only be judged by John's plans and performance. Voters, media outlets and exp | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771736/691c9bd/6ef56a46/11a45711/2688068519/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

I'm so proud of the week we've had.

This team has recognized the urgency of this moment and stepped up to support John's campaign. And watching John debate last night it was easy to see why--his pragmatic policies and progressive values ground him and this campaign, like no one else on that stage.

**John stood tall on stage last night because of your support --but we _can 't_ stop now.**

The strength of this campaign will not only be judged by John's plans and performance. Voters, media outlets and experts will use our fundraising numbers to assess the viability of John's campaign, and our monthly deadline is _tonight_.

[**_We have a critical fundraising deadline tonight --can you chip in now to show how strong our team is?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190731_MES_20190731-fr-MES-cantstop-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I can't stress enough how important this moment is. The number of candidates on stage is likely to be cut in half by the September debates. We've done good work, but the money we raise today will set the tone for the rest of this campaign.

[**_Chip in any amount now to keep the momentum going through the next stretch of John 's campaign._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Why we did so well at last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
The truth is, one of the reasons we did so well in last night’s debate is because we told the truth.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ)
**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign before our July fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight TONIGHT?**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190731-1-120&t=2&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ)
Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign. I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request — especially after last night’s debate — is so important.
The truth is, one of the reasons we did so well in last night’s debate is because we told the truth.
We told the truth about a reality in which almost all of the wealth and income in this country is going to the top 1 percent.
We told the truth about the greed of the insurance and pharmaceutical industries that is literally killing Americans and bankrupting millions more.
We told the truth about a fossil fuel industry that happily accepts short-term profits in exchange for destroying our planet.
We told the truth about corporate America that doesn’t give a damn about the working people of this country.
And we told the truth about the only way to take on these very powerful interests: by building a grassroots movement of millions of Americans who are willing to fight for a government that works for all of us and not just the 1 percent.
That is what this campaign is about. Because I cannot do this alone. And that is why I have to ask:
[**Can you make your first $2.70 contribution before our July fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190731-1-120&t=27&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ)
I am not just running to defeat the most dangerous president in our history — one who is a racist, a sexist, and a homophobe.
I am running to transform this country and to stand with the working class of America.
And if we’re in this fight together, we are going to win.
**Make a $2.70 contribution before our deadline tonight:**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/contribute**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190731-1-120&t=28&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ)
Thank you for everything you’ve done to power this campaign. I cannot do it alone.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190731-1-120&t=29&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=31&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=2396_150750_Ts6htJ&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=33&akid=2396%2E150750%2ETs6htJ).

name: Dan Baer
subject: FOX News admitted what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
I'm seeing Republican mega-donors panic and flood money into my Republican opponent's campaign.
|
---

| | **FOX News admits Democrats could flip Colorado, win Senate control, and oust McConnell from power**
I know you're getting bombarded with emails today, so I'll get right to it:

**[I'm asking for $15 before my End of Month Deadline in 10 hours to help Democrats flip Colorado's Senate seat to Democrats and end Mitch McConnell's grip on the majority. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed1/2639218059/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=15&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Fox News (no, seriously) just admitted that Democrats have a real shot to flip Colorado and win the Senate.

But I'm seeing Republican mega-donors panic and flood money into my Republican opponent's campaign.

He just announced he's raised $5 million from PACs and ultra-wealthy donors alone.

Look, I don't love asking for money... but I truly am relying on grassroots donors like you to close this gap. Unlike my opponent, I'm not taking a single cent of corporate PAC money.

And I don't mean to be dramatic -- but the entire Senate relies on my race.

I need 100 more gifts before midnight to close the gap, keep our ads funded, and reach more voters before my critical End of Month Deadline.

Can I count on your $19? **[Chip in $19 now>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed6/2639218059/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** **[Chip in $35 now>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed7/2639218059/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=35&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** **[Chip in $50 now>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed4/2639218059/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** **[Chip in $100 now>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed5/2639218059/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** **[Chip in another amount now>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12eda/2639218059/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Thanks, Dan

|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12edb/2639218059/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed8/2639218059/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ed9/2639218059/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---
If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12ede/2639218059/VEsHBQ/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/fewer-emails"). We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b6/232dfd1/9d46b70/62a12edf/2639218059/VEsHBA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? "" We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

body:
Nicole is the fighter we need in Washington. Here's why...
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WmKDLYRa10MTxvaTMcWnp3R66FzQnFDpk8YgF8eWTa4N9Od6ZyFSYLDE0sPbdaFrM7uRvIZDFBBMjl0UOQJj0heApsHhxj2IfCoAhsD4sUOG_BhsueLOoCaRIqc8v6kgCueoJ6NqRfKKxv394tfj9w==&c=BaDpSXvSDFbDWRpF0ysjQiDY8yxhN4FMMFdj3-7JmO8QgCgOplMTHQ==&ch=zAD-JQSCxrHS_MPPEv4bPH6YS1JnpLdHjbZiW1-PeVndZMKhlWwyIg==)

| Dear Friend,
When Governor Cuomo attempted to cut funding for veterans' mental health programs this session, Nicole stood up with her colleagues, fought back and got the funding not only restored, but increased.
Then, when the Governor and the democrat controlled State Legislature passed a budget that gave free college tuition to illegal immigrants, [Nicole successfully made the case on Tucker Carlson](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WmKDLYRa10MTxvaTMcWnp3R66FzQnFDpk8YgF8eWTa4N9Od6ZyFSYIIfoSTGjbSz5zh8efajEmxiojKRDO9ngz8ukqLQCViFV55X4nsRJsNHxzyShYxO4AQWqoxNB1wz1hm8A4LI8vDwyrP99j4sjEo5Y5Wtmwb1P_abWMJ8QhWaSdT1hYYJH2AGQHITRK6z&c=BaDpSXvSDFbDWRpF0ysjQiDY8yxhN4FMMFdj3-7JmO8QgCgOplMTHQ==&ch=zAD-JQSCxrHS_MPPEv4bPH6YS1JnpLdHjbZiW1-PeVndZMKhlWwyIg==) that these types of benefits should be going to the children of disabled or deceased military men and women. A week later they were.

| Appearing on Tucker Carlson Tonight, Nicole slams New York Legislature's decision to give free college tuition to Illegal Immigrants before Gold Star Families.
[WATCH NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WmKDLYRa10MTxvaTMcWnp3R66FzQnFDpk8YgF8eWTa4N9Od6ZyFSYIIfoSTGjbSz5zh8efajEmxiojKRDO9ngz8ukqLQCViFV55X4nsRJsNHxzyShYxO4AQWqoxNB1wz1hm8A4LI8vDwyrP99j4sjEo5Y5Wtmwb1P_abWMJ8QhWaSdT1hYYJH2AGQHITRK6z&c=BaDpSXvSDFbDWRpF0ysjQiDY8yxhN4FMMFdj3-7JmO8QgCgOplMTHQ==&ch=zAD-JQSCxrHS_MPPEv4bPH6YS1JnpLdHjbZiW1-PeVndZMKhlWwyIg==)

This is the type of proven leadership Nicole has displayed and she is the type of fighter we need in Washington.

| | | Hi!

We're meeting with Will and the rest of Team Conole in a few minutes here to discuss where we are with our Patriot Fund goal -- but we're still running about $3,250 short.

**[The deadline is midnight TONIGHT, and we really can't miss this goal. Will you rush any amount now to help us close the gap?](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+The+deadline+is+midnight+TONIGHT+and+we+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_1_4&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_1_4&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_1_4")

body:
|
---
Well, you may have noticed that some candidates released stickers and merch with their catch phrases _during the debate_... Tim isn't that guy.

He isn't in this race to be quippy.

He's running for president to bring peace and reason back to America.

**And he knows:** [_**You don't have to yell**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c52/5486deaa/3c400324/dc883ab/920103018/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://store.timryanforamerica.com/you-dont-have-to-yell-6-x-3-5-vinyl-sticker-pack-of-two/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+You+dont+have+to+yell&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER") **to be heard.** **[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c52/5486deaa/3c400324/dc883aa/920103018/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://store.timryanforamerica.com/you-dont-have-to-yell-6-x-3-5-vinyl-sticker-pack-of-two/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER")** [**_Click here to g_**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c52/5486deaa/3c400324/dc883ad/920103018/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://store.timryanforamerica.com/you-dont-have-to-yell-6-x-3-5-vinyl-sticker-pack-of-two/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+g&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER") _**[et your campaign sticker online for a limited time only.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c52/5486deaa/3c400324/dc883ac/920103018/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://store.timryanforamerica.com/you-dont-have-to-yell-6-x-3-5-vinyl-sticker-pack-of-two/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+et+your+campaign+sticker+online+for+a+li&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190731_STICKER")**_

body:
[1]Beto for America

I wasn’t going to email you again so early after last night’s debate, but
we just got some big news. A new poll shows Beto in the lead in Texas’
primary. It also shows Beto is the only Democrat with a sizable lead over
Trump in Texas.

Make no mistake: if we win Texas, we win the White House. Beto is the one
who can make that happen, but it’ll take all of us stepping up.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21172?refcode=ema20190731-46132&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=46132%2E444211%2EBrDZ61 ]Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help us
spread this important news? Your contributions will pave the way for us to
win a historic general election — Beto vs. Trump.
