[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21172?refcode=ema20190731-46132&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=46132%2E444211%2EBrDZ61 ]Contribute $3 »

We’ve always known Beto would make a strong general election candidate.
But the chance to win Texas changes everything.

To put it in perspective, Democrats could lose Michigan, Pennsylvania,
Florida, Arizona, Ohio, Wisconsin and half of Maine — and STILL beat
Donald Trump if we win Texas. Of course, we don’t plan on losing any of
those states!

Thank you so much for all you’ve done to get us this far.

Jen O’Malley Dillon

Beto for America

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: RE--major disadvantage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - We're coming down to the wire. Our end-of-month deadline hits at midnight, and we're still $5,000 short of our goal. _**[Ed is counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in what you can to help close the gap and stay in the fight against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

See below for Ed Markey's email:
* * *
> Hello - In a moment I'm going to ask you to _**[donate to my campaign before our midnight deadline](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ , but first, I want you to know why this is so important.
>
> When I ran for the Senate in 2013, it cost me more than $18 million to win. In 2020, during a presidential election year, it's going to cost even more.
>
> And you can probably imagine why it's going to cost so much. Donald Trump and the RNC are going to pound your tv, radio, and everywhere you go online with attack ads.
>
> And if we miss a single fundraising goal, we'll be at a major disadvantage when those attacks hit.
>
> _**[That's why I have to ask for your help to raise the last $8,402 of our $25,000 goal. Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us keep our momentum moving toward victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _
>
> _**[Donate $10 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-073119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $27 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-073119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $50 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-073119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-073119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $250 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-073119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate another amount](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
> Donald Trump's Republican National Committee is making my defeat one of their top priorities.
>
> I've stood up to Donald Trump from day one calling out his corruption, leading the charge in the Senate to set-back his legislative priorities, and even now, calling for his impeachment.
>
> _**[That's why I need you today, friend. The attacks are coming, and we need to be ready. Will you pitch in $27 and help us fight for victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> Thanks for standing with me,
>
> Ed

Graham announced that he's going to have advisors for each of South Carolina's 46 counties, and has already begun to campaign with Mike Pence in a deep-red state that Donald Trump won by 14 points.

name: Team Weld
subject: Time to Celebrate!
body:
|
---
Friend -- Team Weld here. We’re writing to you today with a very important campaign update: [**It’s Bill’s birthday!**](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=1) Honestly, he’s been working so hard on the campaign trail that he’s barely noticed it’s his big day. I think that means we have a great opportunity to surprise him -- after all, you only turn 74 once! [**Will you join Bill’s celebration by chipping in $74 or $7.40 for his 74th birthday? >>**](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=2)**** Honor. Integrity. Accountability. When Bill decided to run for President, he knew that this campaign would be about our nation’s character. And if there’s one thing that’s important to him, it’s that his public service is built on voters being proud to call themselves his supporters. Needless to say, we’re so incredibly proud of everything Bill’s hard work and advocacy has accomplished, and we know he’ll continue to make all of us proud as President. [**Help us celebrate Bill’s birthday by chipping in $74, $7.40, or whatever you can today >> **](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=3) Thanks for all you do, \- Team Weld

Team Weld
[http://www.weld2020.org/](http://www.weld2020.org/?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=4)
Weld 2020 · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email&n=8), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: NPR just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I asked. My mom, Rosie asked. My brother, Joaquin asked. My wife, Erica asked. Now I'm asking again. That's how absolutely critical this is. [**_NPR just reported tonight could be my last time on the debate stage. But I 'm just one poll away from making the next cut. I'm asking for $15 before my midnight deadline to reach that final poll and secure my spot on that stage. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec9/3eb3e2fc/5b3844f3/744be851/1847530689/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I won't mince words with you: I am the only candidate who has met the donor requirement -- but still hasn't officially qualified for the next debates. You've never let me down before. Not once. When the press counted me out... When the establishment said I was a longshot... When the far right said a kid from an immigrant family could never represent this country... Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Eric, Campaign Manager
subject: FEWER than 100 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Did you get a chance to read this note from Andy's dad the other day?
|
---

| | Peter,

Did you get a chance to read this note from Andy's dad the other day? Governor Beshear was right when he said the stakes are incredibly high.

With fewer than 100 days to go in this tight race, we're really stepping up our game. As Andy's campaign manager, I can promise you that the entire team -- and especially Andy -- will be working harder than ever to reach **every voter in Kentucky**. But we'll need your help to do it. **[Can you please pitch in at this important turning point in the campaign?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433a5/3138196737/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=5")**

Kentuckians are ready for change. They're ready for better schools, better jobs, and a Frankfort that puts them first. And together, we'll make it happen.

Thanks for your support.

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Steve Beshear**
Subject: The final 100 days
> Hi Peter, tomorrow marks **100 days out from Election Day** , so I've spent the past few days reflecting on Matt Bevin's tenure as governor. Unfortunately, as a former governor and a proud Kentuckian, I can't find much to be proud of in Bevin's record.
>
> His bullying of Kentucky's public servants and his attacks on our health care are tough to watch. I'm also troubled by his complete lack of transparency and accountability and his constant refusal to take responsibility for his actions. **Kentuckians deserve better.**
>
> But there's a light at the end of this tunnel: **tomorrow we 'll be 100 days away from electing someone who knows the value of public service and is dedicated to putting Kentuckians first.**
>
> That someone is my son, Andy Beshear. As governor, he'll defend health care for working families, support our teachers and public schools, create good jobs, and protect pensions.
>
> **Can you donate right now to help Andy finish this campaign strong? The clock is ticking!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433ba/3138196737/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433bb/3138196737/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433b8/3138196737/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433b9/3138196737/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=50")**
> **[Express donate $100>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433be/3138196737/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?express_lane=true&refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=100")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433bf/3138196737/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190731nd__180__")**
> We've only got 100 days until Kentucky heads to the polls to decide what kind of governor we want for the next four years.
>
> **We can choose a governor who recognizes the value of our public servants and will always build them up, not tear them down. And we can choose a governor who will return accountability and transparency to Frankfort and restore Kentuckians ' faith in their government.**
>
> [**It 's going to take a team effort to unseat Matt Bevin on November 5th. Will you join me in supporting Andy's campaign for governor? He'll put Kentuckians first -- always.**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b15/ad6dc73/14b25189/db433a5/3138196737/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-100daysaug?refcode=20190731nd__180__&amount=5")
>
> Thank you and onward to Election Day!
>
> \-- Steve Beshear, 61st Governor of Kentucky
>

clean_body: Did you get a chance to read this note from Andy's dad the other day? | | | Peter, Did you get a chance to read this note from Andy's dad the other day? Governor Beshear was right when he said the stakes are incredibly high. With fewer than 100 days to go in this tight race, we're really stepping up our game. As Andy's campaign manager, I can promise you that the entire team -- and especially Andy -- will be working harder than ever to reach every voter in Kentucky. But we'll need your help to do it. "" Kentuckians are ready for change. They're ready for better schools, better jobs, and a Frankfort that puts them first. And together, we'll make it happen. Thanks for your support. Eric Hyers Campaign Manager \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Steve Beshear Subject: The final 100 days Hi Peter, tomorrow marks 100 days out from Election Day , so I've spent the past few days reflecting on Matt Bevin's tenure as governor. Unfortunately, as a former governor and a proud Kentuckian, I can't find much to be proud of in Bevin's record. His bullying of Kentucky's public servants and his attacks on our health care are tough to watch. I'm also troubled by his complete lack of transparency and accountability and his constant refusal to take responsibility for his actions. Kentuckians deserve better. But there's a light at the end of this tunnel: tomorrow we 'll be 100 days away from electing someone who knows the value of public service and is dedicated to putting Kentuckians first. That someone is my son, Andy Beshear. As governor, he'll defend health care for working families, support our teachers and public schools, create good jobs, and protect pensions. Can you donate right now to help Andy finish this campaign strong? The clock is ticking! | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- "" "" "" "" "" "" We've only got 100 days until Kentucky heads to the polls to decide what kind of governor we want for the next four years. body:
Peter,

Hope you are ready for round two of the debates tonight!
I just wanted to reach out to make sure you got a chance to look at Mary's email. We are so close to meeting our end-of-month goal, but the clock is running out. [Please consider pitching in before midnight tonight to help us bridge the gap](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/r_uG37p9mgPffWLgvPElWG1QRftjfa5jFZs4bZU3f9k=) - your support means everything!
Best,
Kris Murphy

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

On Wed, Jul 31, 2019, 9:33 AM Mary Mancini <[mary@tndp.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/TDbGWAOFR8hXCc-pL1lPstERWrAbSR378f6mJlIK1sw=)> wrote:

Peter,

Here's the deal - right now we need your help, plain and simple.

Donald Trump is spreading hate in this country like wildfire. **Leadership matters -** **just look at[House Speaker Glen Casada.](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/uypr1252j6ikagcQ1wv16Ii8vsy98i0K4ZVgUkm7YPs=)**

Mobilizing Tennessee Democrats is critical, and we can't do it alone. We need help from folks like you to pay for things like volunteer training and organizers.

**We are just $635 away from meeting our end-of-month goal - and the clock is ticking**. Will you contribute today, and help us?

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/KKSaOGJF1n641lknmfnLIcuZ6BOz_HMAKAE1B5zwNTs=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/Lsmkn52jeLqm_z3Fxd2wvAr7dDlxJN8u5gYLJTnCKwc=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/t-z0EV9h0JhzEVu81hOtJjYNkYSaEQ0SYnsKSCnBmmc=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I--45d2cOAZx-wxxja5F5jJlQbMir2mtDkurdInD6L8=/AHIvJid9Ga5Yt-aHgUTG5tK8iIAcQF_GNL4uUrUU10A=)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Taking back the Senate is not optional
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Taking back the Senate is not optional. Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP are shamefully standing in the way of lowering the cost of prescription drugs, protecting our elections, and so much more. We can't make any progress in the face of this obstruction.
There is no doubt that we need to defeat President Trump in 2020, but we won't be able to undo the harm he caused and move our nation forward without a Democratic majority in the Senate.
[**We can win back the Senate, but we must start by defending every Democratic seat, including here in Illinois. Contribute $5 to help elect a Democratic majority in 2020.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190731am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
We know the Republicans will fight tooth and nail to hold on to their majority in the Senate. But if we stand together, the battle for the Senate and the future of our country is one we can win.
We've reached the end of the month, but we haven't met our grassroots fundraising goal yet. That's why I'm asking you to go on the record with your support to help us reclaim the Senate.
[**Can you chip in $5 before midnight to help us reach our end-of-month goal?**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190731am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190731am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4ce6/42ab3cf4/62d6cf80/135d70e5/852227502/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4ce6/42ab3cf4/62d6cf80/135d70e6/852227502/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
OH NO, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_3_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Ed needs 245 donations before midnight to reach our goal! Pitch in $10 or more now>>>](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_3_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $10 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073119_3_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: The clock is ticking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
The donations we get today will play a huge role in making it possible for John to reach the 130,000 donor threshold for the September debates--and we need John on stage in order for this campaign to | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771734/691c9bd/6e89781d/11a454cb/163220438/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Mary Ellen's message got us thinking this morning: We're about to reach a critical milestone in this race.

Tonight's fundraising deadline is more important than any we've had so far.

The donations we get today will play a huge role in making it possible for John to reach the 130,000 donor threshold for the September debates--and we need John on stage in order for this campaign to break out of the pack.

[**_Read Mary Ellen 's message, and chip in now to make John a leader in the next phase of this race._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190731_TH_20190731-fr-TH-cantstoptopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,
Team Hickenlooper

\---------------------

**Sender:** Mary Ellen Smith
**Subject:** We Can't Stop Now
**Date:** Wed, July 31

Team,

I'm so proud of the week we've had.

This team has recognized the urgency of this moment and stepped up to support John's campaign. And watching John debate last night it was easy to see why--his pragmatic policies and progressive values ground him and this campaign, like no one else on that stage.

**John stood tall on stage last night because of your support --but we _can 't_ stop now.**

The strength of this campaign will not only be judged by John's plans and performance. Voters, media outlets and experts will use our fundraising numbers to assess the viability of John's campaign, and our monthly deadline is _tonight_.

[**_We have a critical fundraising deadline tonight --can you chip in now to show how strong our team is?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190731_TH_20190731-fr-TH-cantstoptopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I can't stress enough how important this moment is. The number of candidates on stage is likely to be cut in half by the September debates. We've done good work, but the money we raise today will set the tone for the rest of this campaign.

[**_Chip in any amount now to keep the momentum going through the next stretch of John 's campaign._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA clean_body: The donations we get today will play a huge role in making it possible for John to reach the 130,000 donor threshold for the September debates--and we need John on stage in order for this campaign to | | | "" | Friend, Mary Ellen's message got us thinking this morning: We're about to reach a critical milestone in this race. Tonight's fundraising deadline is more important than any we've had so far. The donations we get today will play a huge role in making it possible for John to reach the 130,000 donor threshold for the September debates--and we need John on stage in order for this campaign to break out of the pack. "=" Thanks, Team Hickenlooper \--------------------- Sender: Mary Ellen Smith Subject: We Can't Stop Now Date: Wed, July 31 Team, I'm so proud of the week we've had. This team has recognized the urgency of this moment and stepped up to support John's campaign. And watching John debate last night it was easy to see why--his pragmatic policies and progressive values ground him and this campaign, like no one else on that stage. John stood tall on stage last night because of your support --but we can 't stop now. The strength of this campaign will not only be judged by John's plans and performance. Voters, media outlets and experts will use our fundraising numbers to assess the viability of John's campaign, and our monthly deadline is tonight. "=" I can't stress enough how important this moment is. The number of candidates on stage is likely to be cut in half by the September debates. We've done good work, but the money we raise today will set the tone for the rest of this campaign. "=" ** "=" ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** Thank you, M.E. Smith Mary Ellen Smith Campaign Director Hickenlooper 2020 **** "="**** | | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020 PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible. name: Tim Ryan HQ
subject: getting it right this time around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2")
Now that the debate is over, Tim is back on the road trying to reach every corner of our country to discuss this pivotal moment and what we can do to make sure we get it right this time.

[**But getting it right means investing in the right candidates --which is why we're asking you to chip in whatever you can to keep our movement growing and Tim on the road.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+But+getting+it+right+means+investing+in+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2")

Tim knows what families all over this country worry about at the kitchen table--he knows, because he's lived it. That's why he spent the majority of his time on the debate stage last night talking about the issues, concerns, and anxieties that our communities face day in and day out.

Tim will never stop talking about the everyday struggles that folks all over our country deal with--and more importantly, he will never stop fighting to make sure they are given every tool and resource available to overcome them. That's what he fought for last night in Detroit, and what he will continue to fight for every single day as your President.

[**Help him get there by clicking this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can!**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-postdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Help+him+get+there+by+clicking+this+link&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190731_2_2")

Tim Ryan HQ

** ** ** **
|

Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: will van nuys (personal)
subject: we don't want to tell Francis we missed this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Hey there, just dropping you a quick note. I'm sure you're probably swamped with emails, but this is really important. We have just $900 left to raise for our Patriot Fund before midnight -- and we don't want to have to tell Francis we missed this goal while he was away.

**[Will you pitch in to our Patriot Fund before midnight and help us close the gap? Your support will ensure we have the resources to flip NY-24 blue.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+pitch+in+to+our+Patriot+Fund+be&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")

[https://conole.bsd.net/july-grassroots](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+httpsconolebsdnetjulygrassroots&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")**

Thanks -- I know Francis will really appreciate it.

-Will

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ba/388db0e9/810f104/609affd4/3537208935/VEsF/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ba/388db0e9/810f104/609affd3/3537208935/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ba/388db0e9/810f104/609affd1/3537208935/VEsA/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190731_2_5")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: I need a favor, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
I have a favor to ask, so I'll get right to the point. To keep our campaign on track, it's critical that we meet every benchmark, but we're still about 50 donors short of meeting our July goal.
[**Can I count on you to pitch in $5 before midnight tonight to help us meet our goal?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190731&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
This campaign is about you, friend. It's about people all across Montana who need a U.S. Senator who will fight for their families, not the wealthy and special interests.
I'm ready to be that fighter--and that Senator--but without the millionaires on our side, it's going to take all of us digging deep and doing everything we can to flip this seat blue in 2020.
[**We need to end this month in a strong position so we 're ready to take on Steve Daines--and win. Will you contribute $5 now to help us reach our July goal?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190731&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190731&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647be/1e3760f0/69fa0d2a/5f7e985e/1902901071/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647be/1e3760f0/69fa0d2a/5f7e985f/1902901071/VEsD/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647be/1e3760f0/69fa0d2a/5f7e985c/1902901071/VEsA/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

subject: Just a few hours, and still some work to do

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190731PM_em-buttons&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

What our team is able to do now will go a long way towards keeping Minnesota's Senate seat in Democratic hands.

**And we know that Tina 's race is critical to taking back the Senate and Mitch McConnell losing his majority.**

That's why super PACs have already launched attacks against her, Republican organizers are on the ground, and opponents are lining up to run to take her on.

**Every dollar you can give in this moment will make a BIG difference in ensuring we win this tough race and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell. That's why super PACs have already launched attacks against her, Republican organizers are on the ground, and opponents are lining up to run to take her on. Every dollar you can give in this moment will make a BIG difference in ensuring we win this tough race and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell. And with just a couple hours left until our deadline, there is no time to wait. Make sure she has the resources to fight back. ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The left complains about high drug prices. President Trump is actually fixing it.
body:
For years, the United States has paid exorbitantly higher prices for prescription drugs than other countries. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7b316c3aa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 31, 2019
---
| | |
# **The left complains about high drug prices. President Trump is actually fixing it.**

**For years,** the United States has paid exorbitantly higher prices for prescription drugs than other countries. Both Republicans and Democrats have talked about the skyrocketing cost of medicine for American patients, especially senior citizens.

**But our leaders** in Washington never did anything about it. Until now.

**The Trump Administration’s** new plan, announced this morning, will allow companies to import drugs sold in other countries—including Canada—to save Americans money. Manufacturers can now bring the lower-cost versions of drugs they sell abroad to the United States, so long as the FDA verifies the medicines are identical and meet safety standards.

**Foreign countries** buy drugs at substantially lower prices, meaning American patients subsidize the cost of the expensive drug research and development for the rest of the world. Many times, medicines that cost hundreds of dollars in the U.S. cost as little as a few dollars overseas. Time and time again, our own citizens get the worst deal.

**This terrible system** doesn’t only hurt patients. It costs our taxpayers billions. For example, one medication that helps prevent blindness costs Medicare more than $1 billion a year. It would cost only $187 million if we paid the prices that other countries pay.

**Big Pharma** doesn’t want that to change, but “President Trump listened to the American people,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar says. “We heard about the pain Americans are feeling at the pharmacy counter, we learned that this was impacting Americans’ health, and we’re taking action.”

**Today’s announcement builds** on President Trump’s other efforts to make medicine affordable for all Americans. Following the release of the President’s blueprint to lower prescription drug costs last year, December 2018 marked the first time _in 46 years_ that the official government measure of inflation in drug prices dropped.

**More help** is on the way—“to end foreign freeloading and put American patients first,” Secretary Azar says.

[The details: Safely importing prescription drugs to lower costs for Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=407adf2e42&e=3ee4985eea)

**Sec. Azar and Joe Grogan:** [“How Team Trump Is Keeping Drug Prices Down”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90de1efebf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: 400 years of American democracy **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d6329da0e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President****Trump** spoke to Virginia’s General Assembly yesterday a mile away from the historic Jamestown site where it all began 400 years ago.

**In** **1619** , the first legislative assembly in what would become the United States of America gathered in a small wooden church in Virginia. The group consisted of 22 elected representatives, made up of ordinary settlers who were also explorers, soldiers, farmers, and clergymen. Together, they laid the groundwork for America’s future bequest to the world: a government by, for, and of the people.

**“Self-government** in Virginia did not just give us a state we love. In a very true sense, it gave us the country we love: the United States of America,” President Trump said.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump meets with Mongolian President Khaltmaagiin Battulga at the White House** | July 31, 2019
---
|

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I need you with me before the debate
body:
I am writing you because I
need to know if you have my back before I take the stage for tonight’s
Democratic presidential primary debate.

Will you rush a contribution to our
campaign before I take the stage for tonight’s CNN debate? This is a
critical moment:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:

| [**Friends, tonight 's the night.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaccd/134673f2/e0c91a6/69966053/485656304/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

In an hour I'll head onto the stage for the second debate.

Before I do, I wanted to send you a quick note.

[**When I 'm on stage tonight, here's what I'll be fighting for:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaccd/134673f2/e0c91a6/69966053/485656304/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_073119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") achieving universal health care, leaving the next generation better off than we are, tackling climate change, fixing our broken politics, cleaning up corruption, ending the tyranny of Mitch McConnell and the Freedom Caucus, and building opportunity for ALL Americans - not just the wealthy few.

Thank you for fighting this fight with me, every day. I'm humbled by your support.

Let's do this,

Michael

name: Dan Baer
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Nate Silver and CNN are reporting that our chances of defeating Mitch McConnell's Senate all hinge on my race in Colorado.
|
---

| | In 30 seconds, I'm going to ask for $15. But first, please let me share why.

Nate Silver and CNN are reporting that our chances of defeating Mitch McConnell's Senate all hinge on my race in Colorado.

_**Even Fox News admits I have a real shot to win!**_

But Republicans mega-donors are panicking.

They've funnelled millions to rescue my opponent Cory Gardner.

He just out-raised me by more than $500,000, and we can expect the NRA, and the Koch Brothers' dark money group to spend millions more propping up Gardner.

I refuse to let their big checks wipe out my shot to win and derail our chance to dethrone Mitch McConnell.

But if I want to have a fighting chance, I've got to close this fundraising gap before midnight -- and I need 28 more gifts.

So I'm humbly asking: Can I count on your $19 before my End of Month Deadline?

| | [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e94/3280488497/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e9b/3280488497/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e98/3280488497/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Thanks,

Dan

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e99/3280488497/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e9e/3280488497/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e9f/3280488497/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827b5/232dfd1/9d72003/62a12e9d/3280488497/VEsHBQ/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

---

I'm about to take the stage for the Presidential debate.

I'll be honest: Tonight's End of Month Deadline is the single biggest defining moment of my campaign.

\-- We can either play it safe, blend in, and act like our incredible victory in the first debate was just a fluke.

**\-- Or you can help me send a resounding message to kids watching of every race, creed, and religion:_You can be President, too._**

I plan to leave everything out on that stage tonight.

I just need 837 more supporters to stand with me before my End of Month Deadline to meet my goal and show the world what our movement is capable of.

Can I count on your $15 before midnight?

| [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceca/3eb3e2fc/5bd87bc4/744bebb6/4129229478/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceca/3eb3e2fc/5bd87bc4/744bebbf/4129229478/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceca/3eb3e2fc/5bd87bc4/744bebbe/4129229478/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceca/3eb3e2fc/5bd87bc4/744bebbd/4129229478/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Can I count on your $15 before midnight? | "" "" "" "" "" I know I'll make you proud, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Really quick before I take the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I want to send you a quick note from backstage before tonight's debate begins. I'm so grateful to have the opportunity to share our campaign's message with the American people -- a vision of a future where we actually bring people together to solve our country's biggest injustices; where people put aside their differences and realize that we're all stronger when we help each other; where our leaders are unequivocal in their rejection of the hatred and bigotry trying to tear us apart. And the only reason I'm able to share that message on the national stage is because of people like you. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you. I will do everything I can to make you proud up there. Cory _PS -- The debate will start at 8 p.m. ET tonight and will air on CNN. You can also follow along on[**Twitter**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b506/3155657417/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), [**Facebook**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b505/3155657417/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker"), and [**Instagram**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b504/3155657417/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"). Don't miss it. _
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190731-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190731_CB_20190731-fr-CB-predebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b502/3155657417/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b504/3155657417/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b506/3155657417/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b505/3155657417/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b501/3155657417/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc081f/5fca0d19/c4bcab2/2918b502/3155657417/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: Can you help us reach the finish line?

body:

Peter,

Dick Durbin is fighting to keep Illinois blue and take back the Senate. This is our opportunity to stand with him in the fight. Let's do our part and help him finish the month in a strong position.

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:

| | I can't believe what I'm seeing. Only this morning, I told you I was dangerously short of meeting my end-of-month goal. _**But my team just told me we 're about to have one of the biggest fundraising comebacks of our entire campaign!**_ [_**I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to meet my goal, WIN my race, and DEFEAT McConnell 's Republican Senate. Will you be the gift that puts me over the top? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fd/18e32a7f/54509aa8/7bcaad5a/2759236263/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190731_em_fr_b4_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") I know it was grassroots supporters like you who helped me take back the House last year. **And in moments like these, I 'm reminded just how powerful your support is. ** You know what's at stake with another 2 years of Mitch McConnell. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Kowtowing to China
body:
Kowtowing to China No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Kowtowing to China](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-j/)
More and more, China is having influence over a particular sector of our American entertainment industry. Why you ask? I'm on the blog today talking about it.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Story that Got Ignored Last Week](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-d/)
Last week, the news got consumed by one story - President Trump's ongoing battle with four Democratic Congresswomen. As a result of this media frenzy, there were other important matters that got no coverage whatsoever - that you probably never even heard about. I'd like to tell you about one of those things, that really mattered to a too-often overlooked segment of our country.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [S](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-u/)[omething Different](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-o/)
I'm going to do something a little different this week. As you know, I usually find some topic, or event, or issue, that I think is timely, and interesting, and write about it. This week I'm asking you to read something published over the weekend in the Cincinnati Enquirer.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Are We Losing Our Country?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-p/)
President Trump once declared that a country without borders is not really a country anymore. And he was right. And that's just what seems to be rapidly happening to the greatest country this world has ever known.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiuildiy-kujkulhluu-z/)
